inputs.label: Waste Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the category of waste to apply appropriate cost factors and regulatory thresholds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the category of waste to apply appropriate cost factors and regulatory thresholds.

inputs.label: Waste Volume (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of waste generated in the reporting period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of waste generated in the reporting period.

inputs.label: Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Average cost paid to waste management vendor per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost paid to waste management vendor per kilogram.

inputs.label: Transport Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: One-way distance from facility to disposal or recycling site.

businessContext_i18n.en: One-way distance from facility to disposal or recycling site.

inputs.label: Transport Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilometer for waste transport, including fuel and labor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kilometer for waste transport, including fuel and labor.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Ton
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor hours required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor hours required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of waste.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage including overhead for waste handling personnel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage including overhead for waste handling personnel.

inputs.label: Recycling Revenue per kg
inputs.businessContext: Revenue received from selling recyclable materials per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Revenue received from selling recyclable materials per kilogram.

inputs.label: Recycling Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total waste that is diverted to recycling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total waste that is diverted to recycling.

inputs.label: Carbon Cost per kg CO2e
inputs.businessContext: Internal or regulatory cost assigned to each kg of CO2 equivalent emissions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Internal or regulatory cost assigned to each kg of CO2 equivalent emissions.

inputs.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e/kg waste)
inputs.businessContext: Average greenhouse gas emissions per kilogram of waste based on waste type and disposal method.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average greenhouse gas emissions per kilogram of waste based on waste type and disposal method.

inputs.label: Compliance Penalty per kg
inputs.businessContext: Potential regulatory fines or penalties per kilogram if waste exceeds permitted limits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Potential regulatory fines or penalties per kilogram if waste exceeds permitted limits.

inputs.label: Waste Volume Limit (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Regulatory or internal threshold for waste volume before penalties apply.

businessContext_i18n.en: Regulatory or internal threshold for waste volume before penalties apply.

rules.message: Hazardous waste volume exceeds 100 kg – special handling and documentation required.
Recycling rate must be between 0 and 100 percent.
Disposal cost per kg cannot be negative.

thresholds.message: Waste volume exceeds regulatory limit – potential compliance penalty.
Recycling rate is below 20% – consider improvement initiatives.
Carbon cost per kg CO2e is high – explore emission reduction opportunities.

formulas.label: Disposal Cost
formulas.description: Total cost for waste disposal based on volume and unit cost.

formulas.label: Transport Cost
formulas.description: Cost of transporting waste to disposal or recycling facility.

formulas.label: Labor Cost
formulas.description: Direct labor cost for waste handling.

formulas.label: Carbon Cost
formulas.description: Monetary value of carbon emissions associated with waste.

formulas.label: Compliance Penalty
formulas.description: Potential penalty if waste volume exceeds limit.

formulas.label: Total Waste Cost
formulas.description: Primary result – net cost of waste including all direct and indirect costs minus revenue.
formulas.expression: disposal_cost + transport_cost + labor_cost + carbon_cost + compliance_penalty - recycling_revenue

primary.label: Total Waste Cost
primary.description: Net cost of waste generation for the reporting period.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inefficient Sorting
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Low recycling rate indicates missed revenue and higher disposal costs.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excessive Transport Distance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Long transport distances increase cost and emissions.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Emission Factor
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Waste type or disposal method leads to high carbon cost.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Recycling Rate
suggestedActions.description: Implement segregation programs to boost recycling rate above 30%.
suggestedActions.expectedBenefit: Reduces disposal cost and increases revenue.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Transport Routes
suggestedActions.description: Consolidate waste shipments to reduce distance and cost.
suggestedActions.expectedBenefit: Lowers transport cost and carbon footprint.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Waste Volume
suggestedActions.description: Apply Lean and Six Sigma to minimize waste generation at source.
suggestedActions.expectedBenefit: Decreases all cost components and compliance risk.

suggestedActions.label: Audit Compliance Limits
suggestedActions.description: Regularly review waste volume against limits to avoid penalties.
